environment: deployed event organizer portal and deployed user app
precondition: Windows reported no present Camera/Image device.
action: Open QR scanning, observe camera-unavailable handling, switch to manual input, paste a newly generated user QR payload, and confirm reception.
expected: The camera-unavailable state offers manual entry and a valid manually entered QR completes reception.
actual: The portal displayed the camera-unavailable message, accepted the manual QR payload for user ID 1, incremented the reception count from 12 to 13, and displayed 受付しました with +90 pt.
